answeredQuestions.target-users: End users (desktop/mobile), Accessibility users, IT Security admins, Business owners
answeredQuestions.core-problem: Organizations need multi-modal AI interaction (text + voice) with enterprise security
answeredQuestions.solution-approach: Single Page Application with React 18+, MSAL.js authentication, Web Audio API
answeredQuestions.primary-language-framework: TypeScript/React 18+ with Vite, Azure OpenAI SDK, MSAL.js 3.x
answeredQuestions.testing-approach: Hybrid - Jest + React Testing Library for unit/integration, Playwright for E2E
answeredQuestions.key-constraints: RBAC only (no API keys), SPA architecture, <500ms voice latency
answeredQuestions.security-requirements: No secrets in client code, RBAC authentication, TLS 1.2+
answeredQuestions.backend-requirements: Lightweight Azure Function or Node.js for token handling only

referencesProcessed.keyFindings: Comprehensive stakeholder analysis, risk matrix, 10 acceptance criteria, dependencies documented
8 success criteria, technical stack defined, testing preferences specified

nextActions: Research phase for Azure OpenAI Realtime API specifics
